description: Integration map for Vertex Solutions CSM workflow systems. Shows what data flows exist, what is missing, and the cost of each gap.

existing_integrations.description: Platform errors and usage alerts trigger Zendesk ticket creation automatically.
existing_integrations.quality: Partial — technical data flows but no account context

existing_integrations.description: Calendly links can be embedded in Outlook emails. Booking confirmation emails are sent via Outlook.
existing_integrations.quality: Surface-level only — scheduling happens but is not connected to CRM or ticketing records

missing_integrations.what_should_flow: Open ticket count, ticket status, issue categories, SLA breach flag
missing_integrations.current_state: OpenTicketCount__c in Salesforce is manually maintained. No sync exists.
missing_integrations.workaround: CSM manually checks Zendesk and optionally updates Salesforce field
missing_integrations.revenue_risk: Account health scores in CRM are based on stale ticket data. Renewal decisions made on incomplete information.
missing_integrations.fix_complexity: Low — Zendesk Salesforce connector exists as off-the-shelf integration. Estimated 2-3 days implementation.

missing_integrations.what_should_flow: Contract tier, SLA response times, renewal date, auto-renewal flag, ARR, special provisions
missing_integrations.current_state: ContractTier__c and RenewalDate__c are manually entered in Salesforce. No sync with executed agreements.
missing_integrations.workaround: CSM manually retrieves contract from DocuSign per escalation
missing_integrations.revenue_risk: 8% error rate on contract lookup creates SLA mis-commitment risk. Enterprise accounts mis-served at Basic SLA could invoke credit provisions (~$5,000-$15,000 exposure per incident).
missing_integrations.fix_complexity: Medium — requires DocuSign CLM API integration and field mapping design. Estimated 1-2 weeks implementation.

missing_integrations.what_should_flow: Contract SLA tier, response time commitments, support window hours
missing_integrations.current_state: Zendesk SLA clocks use ticket priority (entered by support agent), not contract terms.
missing_integrations.workaround: Support agents manually type SLA tier into custom field. Frequently wrong or missing.
missing_integrations.revenue_risk: SLA breaches on Enterprise accounts due to wrong SLA clock. Credit exposure if Enterprise account is on 4-hour SLA clock instead of 1-hour contract commitment.
missing_integrations.fix_complexity: Medium — requires DocuSign to Zendesk integration via Salesforce as intermediary. Estimated 2 weeks.

missing_integrations.what_should_flow: Email activity (sender, recipient, subject, date, body summary) auto-logged as Salesforce Activities
missing_integrations.current_state: No email sync. CSMs manually log interactions.
missing_integrations.workaround: CSM manually creates Salesforce Activity after each significant email
missing_integrations.revenue_risk: 17% of interactions missing from CRM. Account history gaps affect renewal risk assessment and CSM handoffs. Estimated 2-3 at-risk renewals per year due to inadequate history during handoff.
missing_integrations.fix_complexity: Low — Salesforce Outlook integration (Einstein Activity Capture or Outlook add-in) is standard. Estimated 1-3 days implementation.

missing_integrations.what_should_flow: Follow-up ticket due dates auto-create calendar events; Calendly bookings auto-update Zendesk ticket status
missing_integrations.current_state: No integration. CSM manually creates Calendly links and tracks in Google Sheet.
missing_integrations.workaround: Personal Google Sheet tracker maintained by each CSM
missing_integrations.revenue_risk: 25% of follow-up tickets missing (estimated). Missed follow-ups after escalations are a leading indicator of churn.
missing_integrations.fix_complexity: Medium — requires Zapier or custom webhook to connect Zendesk ticket status changes to Calendly event creation. Estimated 1 week.

missing_integrations.what_should_flow: Booked meetings auto-create Salesforce Activities with account association
missing_integrations.current_state: Calendly bookings exist only in Calendly and in CSM's personal Google Sheet.
missing_integrations.workaround: Manual entry in Google Sheets tracking doc
missing_integrations.revenue_risk: Scheduled follow-up calls not visible to management. No pipeline of upcoming client interactions in CRM.
missing_integrations.fix_complexity: Low — Calendly to Salesforce integration available via Zapier or native connector. Estimated 1-2 days.
